flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lancaster Bible College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.8k → $15.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lancaster Bible College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lancaster Bible College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 (47.2% → 62.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lancaster Bible College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.6k).
